tools.reverse: Reverses the input string. Args: text
tools.uppercase: Converts text to uppercase. Args: text
tools.concat: Concatenates two strings. Args: str1, str2
tools.substring: Extracts substring from position with length. Args: text, start, length. Note: indexes start from 0

prompt: Reverse 'abc', take the first 2 characters, convert to uppercase, then concatenate with 'XYZ'.
